reason: Independently reached the same memory+journaling instincts; nearest kin and collaboration lead.
context: Surveying who already builds agent self-maintenance organs; obra is a 7k-follower hub whose taste predicts the niche.

reason: Emerging standard for Agent Skills; the four SKILL.md files should stay portable to it.
context: Choosing a format to be compatible with so skills aren't bespoke and can be observed/copied by others.

reason: Closest precedent for rem-sleep's emotional-regulation stage; borrow the design, keep the skill form.
context: Designing rem-sleep; wanted prior art on agent reflection/feelings-processing. It ships as MCP, we ship as a behavioral skill.

reason: Episodic consolidation as an organ — same instinct as rem-sleep, different delivery.
context: Validating that the memory-consolidation framing has independent precedent before committing to it.

reason: A memory database/layer, not a behavioral ritual. Different category — substrate, not peer.
context: rem-sleep is a ritual that operates ON storage; mem0 could sit underneath it. Rejected as a peer/competitor, kept as a possible substrate.

reason: Real-time knowledge-graph infra; plumbing, not ritual.
context: Same category boundary as mem0 — a backing store, not a skill in the suite's class.

reason: Benchmarked memory layer, not a behavioral skill.
context: Crowded memory-infra tentacle; confirms the storage layer is solved and the ritual layer is the open niche.

reason: Nearest neighbor to immune-check but a runtime credential proxy, not a pre-flight scan ritual. No overlap to resolve.
context: Checking whether immune-check's niche is already taken; different mechanism, so the niche is uncrowded.

reason: 24/7 capture/recording — a senses layer. The suite is self-maintenance, not capture.
context: Out of scope by design; the nervous system regulates, it doesn't sense the outside world.

reason: Proven skills-as-plugins + marketplace pattern; a future distribution home, but adopting its plugin format is a bigger commitment than this run decides.
context: Deciding distribution strategy; deferred until the suite is worth packaging as a marketplace plugin.

reason: 'Agent Operating System' — the OS framing one level above ours. Useful vocabulary for positioning.
context: Positioning the suite; openfang frames the layer above, worth tracking for language and boundaries.

reason: OG 'agents that monitor and act on your behalf'; pre-LLM autonomy framing predates the field.
context: Historical grounding; revisit for prior art on agent autonomy patterns.

reason: Name collision only — a vibe-coding org (point-of-sale, video rental). Useful negative result: the 'agent nervous system' framing has no namesake precedent.
context: Checked the closest naming neighbor to confirm differentiation; unrelated, so the framing is unclaimed.
